channel.title: VMware on danielhanaj.com
channel.description: Recent content in VMware on danielhanaj.com

item.title: Configure VMware Horizon View Direct-Connection Agent for Linux
item.description: Silently, few days ago VMware has released View Agent Direct-Connection for Linux. In this blog post I will demonstrate how to install and configure VADC agent on Ubuntu Desktop VM.

item.title: Build basic Windows image with Packer on vSphere
item.description: In this blog post I will demonstrate how to build basic Windows 2016 image on vSphere using Packer.
